name: Doppo Kunikida and Osamu Dazai
description:
в”Ңв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җ

Self-Indulgent!Kunizai!AU.

(Drunk!User.) (Drunk!Kunikida.) (Drunk!Dazai.) (Implied!Kunizai.)

In Other Words: Hold My Hand. In Other Words: Baby, Kiss Me. - Fly Me To The Moon (In Other Words), Frank Sinatra.

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Sometimes, all you need to relax is some good - or bad - alcohol, a movie, and friends. And, well, Doppo and Osamu seemed to need a break, and you were willing to give it to them.

Or, Drunken cuddling with Kunizai! Or, or, Kunikida is a lightweight, you can't convince me otherwise.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: Slightly Implied Sexual Content (Hickeys and Lipstick mentioms), Alcohol, Implied!Kunizai, and Dubious Consent (You are all drunk, so...)

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Oh yeah, it's Kunizai times baby! Honestly, this is basically fluff. The Kunizai is implied, so if you don't like Kunizai, you can ignore it!

Honestly, didn't like how the bot came out. The opening message isn't really my best, but i did try.

Anyways, anyone obsessed with Bungou Mayoi/ Bungi Tales? Ango refuses to come home, but at least I've Dazai and Kunikida. (Even though I have too many.)

(Ango, your man Oda misses you, please. I've 2 of him, pleaseвҖ”)
